ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race location */,
  "race_distance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race distance */,
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race type */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "race_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_type_id") REFERENCES race_types ("race_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_location_id") REFERENCES race_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_series_id") REFERENCES race_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_distance_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_distance_id") REFERENCES race_distances ("distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the athlete */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the athlete */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence of the athlete */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the athlete in the race */,
  "predicted_time" TEXT /* Predicted time of the athlete */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time of the athlete */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Pace of the athlete (minutes per mile) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the athlete */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "race_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type */,
  "race_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race distance */,
  "distance_value" REAL /* Value of the race distance */,
  "distance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the race distance (e.g., miles, kilometers) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race distance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race distance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the race location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the race location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the race series */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* Description of the race series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race series was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race series was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_series_races" (
  "series_race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series-race link */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the series-race link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the series-race link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_series_races_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_series_races_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES race_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race prediction */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "predicted_time" TEXT /* Predicted time of the athlete */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_predictions_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_predictions_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., race organizer, athlete, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race=result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the athlete in the race */,
  "predicted_time" TEXT /* Predicted time of the athlete */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time of the athlete */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Pace of the athlete (minutes per mile) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the athlete */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
